name: Energy Metering Agent
description: Provides access to electricity tariffs, meter readings, billing history, and raw smart meter data for utility grid operations.

scopes.read:billing: Read customer billing history and invoices

skills.name: Tariff Lookup
skills.description: Retrieve current and historical electricity tariff schedules, peak/off-peak rates, and seasonal adjustments.
examples: What is the current peak-hour tariff?
Show the winter season rate schedule

skills.name: Consumption Analysis
skills.description: Analyse household energy consumption patterns from meter readings and billing records.
examples: Show my electricity usage for January
Compare this month's consumption to last year

skills.name: Grid Diagnostics
skills.description: Access raw smart meter telemetry at 15-second granularity for grid diagnostics and fault analysis. Requires grid-engineer authorisation and human approval.
examples: Show raw voltage readings for transformer T-4401
Analyse power quality events in sector 7
